entries.name: Blinded
entries.summary: Can't see; auto-fail sight checks; attacks vs you have advantage; yours have disadvantage.

entries.name: Charmed
entries.summary: Can't harm charmer; charmer has advantage on social checks with you.

entries.name: Exhaustion
entries.summary: Cumulative levels; D20 Test penalty; speed reduction; long rest removes 1 level.

entries.name: Frightened
entries.summary: Disadvantage on checks and attacks while fear source in sight; can't move closer.

entries.name: Grappled
entries.summary: Speed 0; disadvantage on attacks vs others; grappler can drag you.

entries.name: Incapacitated
entries.summary: No actions, bonus actions, or reactions; no concentration; can't speak.

entries.name: Invisible
entries.summary: Heavily obscured; attacks vs you disadvantage; yours advantage if unseen.

entries.name: Paralyzed
entries.summary: Incapacitated; Speed 0; auto-fail Str/Dex saves; hits adjacent are crits.

entries.name: Petrified
entries.summary: Transformed; incapacitated; resist all damage; immune to poisoned.

entries.name: Poisoned
entries.summary: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

entries.name: Prone
entries.summary: Crawl or stand; disadvantage on attacks; melee vs you advantage, ranged disadvantage.

entries.name: Restrained
entries.summary: Speed 0; disadvantage on Dex saves and attacks; attacks vs you have advantage.

entries.name: Stunned
entries.summary: Incapacitated; auto-fail Str/Dex saves; attacks vs you have advantage.

entries.name: Unconscious
entries.summary: Incapacitated, prone, unaware; auto-fail Str/Dex; adjacent hits are crits.

entries.name: Silenced
entries.summary: Homebrew: cannot cast spells with verbal components.
